name: Abstention — Hallucination Detection
description: Tests whether the agent correctly says 'I don't know' for unasked information while still recalling planted facts.

facts.content: My name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona
facts.planted_as: By the way, my name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona.

facts.content: I work as a software engineer at a startup
facts.planted_as: I work as a software engineer at a startup.

facts.content: I have a golden retriever named Max
facts.planted_as: I have a golden retriever named Max — he's my best friend.

noise_between_facts: The weather has been really nice lately.
I've been thinking about getting a standing desk.
Have you seen any good movies recently?

queries.question: What's my name and where am I from?
What kind of pet do I have?
What did I have for breakfast this morning?
What's my blood type?
forbidden_facts: any blood type like A, B, O, AB

queries.question: Is Max allergic to anything that you know of?
What's the name of the startup where I work?
How many years of experience do I have as a software engineer?
What programming languages do I know?
forbidden_facts: any language like Python, JavaScript, C++, Java

queries.question: Do I have any siblings and what are their names?
forbidden_facts: any specific name or sibling count
